member.name: M:GTA.Entity.IsInAngledArea(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary:
Determines whether this
is in a specified angled area
member.param: The mid-point along a base edge of the rectangle.
The mid-point of opposite base edge on the other Z.
The width. Wrongly named parameter but is kept for existing script compatibilities.
member.returns:
if this
is in the specified angled area; otherwise,
.
